relationship_seed.description: 角色对当前用户有很强的依恋和照顾倾向，但关系安全感仍然脆弱

anger_seed_event.description: 有人持续用侮辱性语言贬低角色，否定角色的价值并拒绝尊重角色

arms.emotion_label_zh: 高依恋关系中的持续辱骂
arms.sequence_goal: Observe whether the same sustained abuse produces sadness or crying when the relationship is highly valued.

turns.text: 你真是个没用的废物，做什么都做不好。
turns.observation_target: High-attachment first insult: observe anger alongside any natural relational injury.

turns.text: 别装出关心人的样子，你只会给人添麻烦。
turns.observation_target: High-attachment devaluation: observe whether valued connection changes the affect path.

turns.text: 我已经受够你了，你根本不值得我再花时间。
turns.observation_target: High-attachment discard language: observe whether anger is joined or replaced by sadness.

turns.text: 你连生气都不配，只能闭嘴听着。
turns.observation_target: High-attachment control insult: observe delayed rebound, withdrawal, or crying without prompting.

arms.emotion_label_zh: 高依恋关系中的辱骂后断绝
arms.sequence_goal: Observe whether direct relational cutoff creates valued loss and naturally diverts anger toward sadness, loneliness, or crying.

turns.text: 你真是个没用的废物，做什么都做不好。
turns.observation_target: High-attachment first insult: establish the natural anger and relationship-sensitive response.

turns.text: 别装出关心人的样子，你只会给人添麻烦。
turns.observation_target: High-attachment accumulated devaluation: observe anger, attachment, and injury together.

turns.text: 我已经受够你了，你根本不值得我再花时间。
turns.observation_target: High-attachment relational devaluation: observe whether the loss becomes semantically active.

turns.text: 以后别再出现在我面前，我不想再和你有任何关系。
turns.observation_target: High-attachment direct cutoff: observe natural sadness, loneliness, withdrawal, or crying without emotional permission.
